visual_anomalies: console.log(null)导致Runner崩溃，显示全页错误覆盖层替代正常控制台输出
TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'toJSON') at CustomTailoredObjectInspector.render
问题代码: if (obj.toJSON) { — 缺少null检查，obj为null时访问null.toJSON抛出TypeError
Runner显示'1 of 2 errors on the page'，两次运行均触发同一错误
console.log(null)未能正常输出null值，Runner完全崩溃
reasoning_summary: mano-cua 15步验证：在Script Lab编辑器输入console.log(null)/console.log(undefined)/console.log(0)后点击Run，Runner页面(localhost:3200)崩溃显示TypeError。CustomTailoredObjectInspector组件在render方法中直接访问obj.toJSON而未做null检查，当console.log(null)传入null时触发TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'toJSON')。正常应显示null输出，实际Runner完全崩溃。
deploy_method: nvm use 18 + react-scripts start (editor port 3000 + runner port 3200)
notes: 需同时启动editor(3000)和runner(3200)两个服务。buggy commit中common包的CustomTailoredObjectInspector.js:25缺少null guard。
